desc: Three-axis long-term memory plugin: manages episodic memory, social relations, and narrative summaries for chatbots across platforms.

webui_port.hint: Port for the plugin admin interface

webui_auth_enabled.hint: Require password to access the WebUI

embedding_enabled.hint: Disable to use BM25 keyword search only

embedding_provider.hint: local = local model, api = remote API

retrieval_top_k.hint: Maximum memory events injected per prompt

retrieval_weighted_random.hint: Use Softmax sampling instead of deterministic Top-K

retrieval_sampling_temperature.hint: Applies in weighted random mode only; 1.0 = standard

memory_isolation_enabled.hint: Isolate search results by group ID

memory_cleanup_retention_days.hint: Archived events are permanently deleted after this period

impression_update_alpha.hint: Exponential moving average coefficient for impression updates
